label: Aggregate (LLM)
description: LLM-driven reduce over an array. Two modes: `reduce` (single LLM call with the entire array serialized into the prompt → one summary string + one usage entry) and `map` (N LLM calls, one per item → array of N results). Uses the SAME /v1/chat/completions endpoint as llm_completion / llm_router. Smart Router via model:'auto' resolves to the platform's DB-backed registry (SoT). Closes the flowbuilder-gap-analysis P1.16 'LLM-driven reduce' gap.

settings.name: items
settings.label: Items
settings.description: The array to aggregate. Strings are JSON.parsed first; non-array results fail-CLOSED.

settings.name: mode
settings.label: Mode
settings.description: `reduce` = one LLM call over the whole array → one summary. `map` = N LLM calls, one per item → array of N results. Use `reduce` when the model can hold the whole list in its context window; use `map` when items need independent analysis or the array is large.

settings.name: prompt
settings.label: Prompt
settings.placeholder: Summarize these incident findings into one P0 / P1 / P2 narrative paragraph: {{items}}
settings.description: Template for the user prompt. In `reduce` mode, `{{items}}` is replaced with the JSON-serialized array. In `map` mode, `{{item}}` is replaced with each item in turn (and `{{itemIndex}}` for 0-based position).

settings.name: systemPrompt
settings.label: System prompt
settings.description: Override the default aggregation system prompt.

ai.shortDescription: LLM reduces a list (or maps over items) to a higher-level summary or per-item transformation.
ai.whenToUse: When you have a list of items (findings, alerts, log lines, search results) and want either (a) a single LLM-written narrative summarizing them all (`reduce`), or (b) a per-item LLM transformation like classification / extraction (`map`).
ai.examplePrompt: Use aggregate with mode:reduce to turn the 9 Prometheus findings into one #devops Slack paragraph.
ai.promptHints: Use `{{items}}` in reduce mode and `{{item}}` in map mode. The output type changes per mode: reduce → string; map → array<string>.

outputAssertions.name: output_present
outputAssertions.errorMessage: aggregate did not produce a reduced output or mapped array.
